title: cyclosorus repandulus
intro: Cyclosorus repandulus, also known as the Water Fern or Water Clover Fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is native to tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus repandulus include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and acting as a natural diuretic. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
